assembly.noSrt: Akukona i-SRT okwanje. Misa umkhosi 7 okwejwayelo.
asset.allEpsTitle: Imifanekiso / VO / amakadi: akhawule imiphumela kusukela KUKHULU lonke (hhayi kukhulu lokhu kuphela). SFX nomculo buhlala babelane.
asset.altDrag: {key} — thatha v{v} · hudula phezu kwekhela ukuze usebenzise lokho kuthatha
asset.altsTitle: IMIFANEKISO ye-tab: futhi ilista izinto ezingenzeki okugcina zokunosha (kukhula kwangaphambili) zeshashiso lenye. Hudula enye ukuba usebenzise lokho kuthatha.
asset.musicDrag: hudula {file} phezu kwe-MUSIC track · qhubeka nokubonga ulwazi
asset.noShots: Ayikho imifanekiso — engeza okushintshiwe ku-Video tab.
asset.sfxDrag: hudula {file} phezu kwe-SFX track · qhubeka nokubonga ulwazi
asset.shotDrag: hudula {key} phezu kwekhela ekufundekile ku-SHOTS track
asset.shotDragForeign: hudula {key} phezu kwekhela ekufundekile ku-SHOTS track (kukhula kusukela {slug})
audio.continuousTitle: Ukuqalisa iziculo kuqhubeka kusiya okuthile okusixwayiso (phandle = iziculo eyodwa kuphela)
audio.createVoiceTitle: Nqamula isizwi: sukela intengo encane ehlanzekile ikhlipu (mp3/wav/m4a/mp4) futhi u-OmniVoice enza umbawo ongakwazi ukumisa isizwi.
audio.generateSfxTitle: Sebenzisa i-LLM endawo ukuze ubale isichasi njengo-radio play futhi uphakamisele umthelela ohlobene — ukuthola amakhi oyilungile. Ifaka kumaglava emasonweni ekuthweleni isikhathi.
audio.holdPlaceholder: (lokela icue — okubhala lapo kanye nokuthetha VO)
audio.preCacheTitle: Lokela isichasi sakho sonke samakhauni sesikhalo osidla-luyase ayoshele ngantuthuko iguBuGaliyane enkulu
audio.sectionSubtitle: / i-cue ngayinye · tholela i-SFX phakathi kwamacue
audio.selectCueHint: Khetha icue emuva ukubona imetadata yayo ephelele.
audio.voicesTitle: Nqamula amazwi ashintshwe ku-mnumzane ngamunye (okubhala manifest.voice.speaker_map).
createvoice.doneFooterNote: Engezela kumalingiswa ehlobo lale misheni, khiblidi/manifesto ukuze usebenzise ilo izwi le-VO.
createvoice.footerNote: Ikopha ngaphezu kwe-OmniVoice e-2080 Ti. Ikhlipi liyajwayeza kokuqala iye ku-24kHz mono. Igama elinye nelizwi lishintshwe.
createvoice.hintRefClip: (mp3 / wav / m4a / mp4 — ibanga elinjani elinesikhali sengoma enendlela)
createvoice.title: DALA IZWI
createvoice.workingMsg: Qalisa i-OmniVoice (ikopha yokuqala yeseshini ingase sithatha kuze kube ~3 min ukuningi i-GPU) nokubeka… gcina lokhu luvaliwe.
diagnostics.preflightNote: Lokhu kusemenza umhlinzeki wo-pre-flight (<0>{cmd}</0>) kumakhotiwe. Kuphela kuhlola — alukaze kusukela okutholakala.
diagnostics.title: Izilungiselelo zesistimu
docs.editorHint: UTF-8 · markdown · LF · Ctrl/Cmd+S ukuze igcinwe
dopesheet.continuousTitle: Iziculo ezikhanda ziqhubeka kusiya okuthile okunokuqedela (phandle = iziculo eyodwa kuphela)
dopesheet.title: IPHEPHA LESIKHALO
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.one: Lokhu kungenisa kwaletha {n} umuntu njengowesisaziso. Ukuphinda-kusho kuba isakhiwo ku-OmniVoice yalolu munye umuntu kanye nokuqonda kabusha abakhulumi be-{show}. Kuqala u-OmniVoice futhi kusetshenziswe i-GPU (~imizuzwana embalwa nge-umuntu). Ungakwenza kamuva kuvoti lokuhwebu.
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.other: Lokhu kungenisa kwaletha {n} abantu njengowesisaziso. Ukuphinda-kusho kuba isakhiwo ku-OmniVoice kanye nokuqonda kabusha abakhulumi be-{show}. Kuqala u-OmniVoice futhi kusetshenziswe i-GPU (~imizuzwana embalwa nge-umuntu). Ungakwenza kamuva kuvoti lokuhwebu.
filemenu.cloneVoicesFailed: Hamba kahle: {names}. Misa kabusha kuvoti lokuhwebu uma u-OmniVoice esempilo.
filemenu.exportAssetsCheckbox: Faka impahla (izwi, isandi, umculo) — umbuzie omkhulu
filemenu.exportBody: Ibundie igama lekhompeli (iskripti, manifest, youtube) + izabhu zekaridi yesihloko. Ngezimpahla, ibundie kanye nemithombo ebinare i-manifest ibheke — amahintlela ezwi lwe-OmniVoice, isandi, kanye nomculo — kanye ne-katalogi yento, ukuze umthakathu angena futhi achofuze iginathi. I-media egenariwe (ividiyo eyenziwe / i-mp4 yokugcina) akukaze ikuhlanganiswe.
filemenu.exportVoiceHint: (Umuntu owodwa angakhupha kulehamba lwe-Audio voice picker.)
filemenu.newEpisodeHint: Izaakhi i-manifest + iskripti esibonakalisiwe kusuka kumikhondo yokajwayelekile yekhompeli. Ngemuva kwalokho bhala iskripti bese uchofoza Generate manifest.
filemenu.newShowHint: Imikosi izobe ekusulwaini efakwini elisha. Izwi/umkhondo wezingca zishashawe kusuka kukhompeli likajwayelekile — zisile ezilungiselelo eziseMilungiselelo → Imetadata yekhompeli.
filemenu.shutdownBody: Lokhu khokhela i-GPU — kusime i-ComfyUI, OmniVoice, kanye ne-Ollama ama-konteyina — bese kusima iseva ye-Studio. Ukuze kusetshenziswe i-Studio kabusha kuzodingeka kuqalwa kuvoti (<0>{cmd}</0>, noma isevisi ye-systemd).
filemenu.shuttingDown: I-MACU Studio iyakhohla i-GPU futhi iyasika…
filemenu.shuttingDownBody: Ungavala ithabu yebrowser na. Qala i-Studio kabusha kuvoti uma ufuna ukubuyela.
graphics.bespokeCardDesc: lokhu kwenziwe njengomchazi, hhayi kusukela ku-layout osalwandle, ngako kube ayikho izinkambu ezisizakalayo ngako. Khetha i-layout ngezansi + gcwalisa umbhalo ukuze yenzeke yisizakalayo (noma disenela i-layout entsha enama-AI).
graphics.bespokeHint: Ikhombise "Lungiselela" (hhayi "Regen") ngoba lokhu amakadi kwenziwe njengomchazi, hhayi kusukela ekumlethwe i-layout, ngako kube ayikho izinkambu ezisizakalayo. Lungiselela okwesikhosini ukuze yenzeke i-regen-able.
graphics.briefPlaceholder: isib. ibhodi ye-Crater: SECTOR NINE SLAGS vs SECTOR FOUR GLOWBOYS, izinombolo ezikhulu zephuzu eziqonda 2 → 1, 'ABAKHOKHI ABALISELE' ngaphansi
graphics.cantRenameHint: — ayikho ukubuya ibizo; yenza amakadi amasha ukuze uguqule i-id
graphics.cardBlurb.freshTitle: Inkomponi yokhankaso olunge nganye (ifomu lokuqalisa). AI ibhala imigqa emibili emikhulu yesihloko (emfushane, yonke iyalitha, enokufa) + isikebezi + umugqa wezitatimende kusuka ekuskriptini.
graphics.cardBlurb.macuTitle: Isibukiso somkhankaso esiqhubekayo (ifomu lokuqalisa). Umuphi uMark ubekwe ekuseni ekuphakanyiswe "THE MACU / REPORT"; AI ibhala kuphela isikebezi sokuphoqa + umholo womsebenziso.
graphics.cardBlurb.weather: Umkhankaso weNkathi (ifomu leveza). Inbiko yeveza engabamnandi efakele emhlabeni osulelwe amagezi.
graphics.cardConfigureTitle: Lungiselela — lokhu amakadi ayikho i-layout esizakalayo ngako; hlukanisa okwesikhosini ukuze yenzeke i-regen-able
graphics.cardRegenTitle: Regen — buyeze kusukela kulayawuthe olungiselwe + izinkambu
graphics.cardTypeNote: Uhlobo lwe-amakadi kuphela kubaluleka uma uqhubeka "Bhala umbhalo enama-AI" — ukhetha inzwi, izinkambu ezibhalwa, futhi ukupilenisi i-layout kule amakadi uhlobo lokho.
graphics.compGeneratedSuccess: i-layout "{key}" kwakhe kwenziwe futhi yakhethwe ngezansi — manje gcwalisa umbhalo ku-step 3.
graphics.configureBtnTitle: Lokhu amakadi ayikho i-layout esizakalayo noma umbhalo ngako — hlukanisa okwesikhosini, khona kube i-regen-able
graphics.createPendingBriefTitle: Wabhala umbhalo omfushane ku-step 2 — qhubeka 'Kwakhela ukungenela' okwesikhosini, noma sula umbhalo omfushane ukuze usebenzise i-layout ekhethwe
graphics.designWithAiHelp: Kuphela ikhona uma ayikho i-layout enezansi ekunela. Chaza amakadi; imodeli yendawo (Qwen) ibhala i-HyperFrames layout entsha futhi iyisitore ngaphansi kwembizo kusukela ku-step 1. Bese uzofaka umbhalo ku-step 3.
graphics.editBtnTitle: Hlela lokhu amakadi i-layout noma umbhalo, bese buyeze
graphics.editModalFooterHint: Sisitore iziguquko zakho futhi buyeze amakadi.
graphics.genCompBtnTitle: Kwakhela i-HyperFrames layout entsha kusukela kulebh umbhalo omfushane, esitore ngaphansi kwembizo kucala ku-step 1
graphics.generateFirstWarning: Qhubeka "Kwakhela ukungenela" ukuze kusake i-layout. Kuze kube umuntu owenza okukusho, "Kwakhela + buyeze" usebenzisa i-layout ekhethwe ngezansi futhi iqaphele lebh umbhalo omfushane.
graphics.nameFirstWarning: ↑ ibizo amakadi ku-step 1 okwesikhosini — yenzeke i-layout entsha imbizo.
graphics.newModalFooterHint: Sisitore amakadi futhi buyeze nje nge-mp4.
graphics.noTitleSelected: Ayikhethwe umkolo — khetha enye kwamakadi ngakwesokudla.
graphics.regenBtnTitle: Buyeze lokhu amakadi kusukela kulayawuthe olungiselwe + izinkambu
graphics.step1Hint: I-id emfushane, esetsenziswa ngefayela. Isib. lower_third, scoreboard.
graphics.step2Hint: I-"composition" i-template enesifo — iququla lapho umbhalo uhlale khona nokuthi kumele ukhuphele kanjani. Isikhanyiso ibonisa i-layout ekhethwe; ‹TOKENS› yosungulwe lapho umbhalo wakho okungenela.
graphics.step3Hint: Lezi nzuzo zibusela ‹TOKENS› ku-layout. Zibhale, noma vumela i-AI icacise kabusha kusukela emcimbini walonqanc lokhu kukhankaso.
graphics.thumbClickTitle: Qhubeka ukuze ama-magnify · bhrawuza okuguquguqua · bona i-template + izinkambu
graphics.thumbModalDesc: Buyeza i-youtube_thumb composition ekuqedile/{slug}_thumb.png. Umbonakude wamanje usitore kuqala.
graphics.writeTextBtnTitle: Ilibhala kabusha umbhalo ngezansi kusukela emcimbini walonqanc lokhu kukhankaso, kule amakadi uhlobo lowazi.
graphics.writeThumbBtnTitle: Bhala i-hook yembonakude enesikhali edlulekile nama-LLM yendawo (Ollama)
localize.busyOrUnrendered: khanda inhlelo, noma ulinde ukuphela kokukhanda okuthokezelayo
localize.haikuNote: Ukuze ukwazi ukuhumusha ukusho amagama ngesikhashana ngazo, buza u-Claude esisafuleni semiteresi — ayinakho izixhobo zombala ephulamthembu esizinzile.
localize.renderFirst: Qala ngokukhanda leli nhlelo ku-English kuqala — lokalizela kusebenzisa isithombe esilandiwe kanye nochungechunge olungenelisiwe, ngakho-ke ludinga ukhando oluwophelelele.
localize.runningNote: Ilimi ngalinye lisundulelwa kusetshenziswa i-GPU, elilodwa ngesikhathi. Ungavala lokhu — iqhubeka.
localize.title: Lokalizela — izingalo + indlubu
log.empty: Ayikho umsebenzi. Emaphini emumvutheli futhi izaziso zizokusomela lapha.
log.title: ILOGGU LOMSEBENZI
metadata.emptyHint: Khetha iclip ku-timeline noma i-asset ku-drawer.
metadata.title: IDATHA
placeholder.comingSoon: Izayo. v0.1 itathuza isigaba se-5 (Isonganiso) okongezele kokuqeda. Ezinye izigaba zizofika ekuvotsheni ezizayo.
script.generateTitle: Buyala i-script.md cue ekhethekile (qapela phambi kokusbhala)
script.mergeHelp: Amacue ayahlaziywa kabusha kusukela ku-<0>script.md</0> futhi ayanyamelwa; amavoice profile, izilinganiso zamakarakithi, i-b-roll, comfyui/style/music nokuthwala kwe-title asset ayalondolozwa. I-<1>manifest.json.bak</1> enesikhathi ethweswe phambi kokusetshenziswa.
script.modeDiffTitle: Linganisa izinhlobo ezisenzisiwe (okuluhlaza okwengezwe / okubomvu okususiwe)
script.noChangesDetail: Isichasi sifana nomaphu — akukho okusukela kubhala.
script.noDiffChanges: Azikho izinguquko phakathi kwezi nhlobo ezimbili.
script.noVersionsYet: Azikho izinhlobo ezisenzisiwe njengamanje. Sicela i-git sync button ukuze ikhethwe le script, bese ubuyele ukuqhathanisa.
script.oneVersionOnly: Inhlolo eyodwa kuphela kuze kube manje ({label}). Senza kabusha ngemuva kokuedit okuthi uqaphele diff.
script.renumbered: ⚠ kukhethulwe kabusha (VO cache angakwazi akhe kabusha)
script.unmappedHint: Wengeza ku-voice.speaker_map (Manifest drawer) noma lawo macue ngeke athole VO.
settings.comfy.stub: Weza i-checkpoints kumshumayeli we-ComfyUI (:8188) nokhumbuzelela okufanele ngokwalomuntu emishoweni. Izayo.
settings.comfy.title: Umphathi weimihlela ye-ComfyUI
settings.git.stub: Qulunqula i-URL yeremot kanye nengu elwalusi Studio sync script/manifest/youtube ukuya. Imininingwane isebenzisa ikhiya ye-SSH eyakhona yelepoksi. Izayo.
settings.lang.help: Shintshanisa ulimi lwesithandani. Usetshenziswa ngokushesha okufanele ushiywe omsulwini.
settings.lang.title: Ulimi
settings.show.name: Igama lokumiswa
settings.theme.help: Buya emvumelwanweni yomqondo womkhathi. Usetshenziswa ngokushesha okufanele ushiywe omsulwini.
settings.theme.title: Imvamisa yombala
settings.title: Izilungele
sfx.delayTitle: i-delay nudge — amasekhondi, signed (− ngaphambili / + kamuva mula ku-anchor cue)
sfx.helpAgen: Kwasendawo i-AudioGen → 24 kHz/−3 dBFS ku-kit · pinned to
sfx.phAgenPrompt: isib. 'heavy iron door slam, dry, close mic'
sfx.phMusicPrompt: isib. 'sickly lo-fi big-band waltz, tape hiss, mono'
sfxgen.error.gpuBusy: I-GPU ibhisy — render esisebenzayo. Zama kabusha lapho i-idle.
sfxgen.gain.label: g
sfxgen.gain.title: gain — 0–1 linear
sfxgen.idle.body: Funda i-script njengokudlala i-radio bese unikezela umpilo osungu, okuchumile iki.
sfxgen.idle.hint: Chisela Qala ukuqala — i-Ollama ibhalwa ku-GPU, ~30-60s.
sfxgen.loading.body: Ibuza i-LLM yakusendawo (Qwen2.5-7B) ukuba ifunde i-script njengokudlala i-radio…
sfxgen.review.empty: Akukho i-sound-effect opportunities etholakalele — uhlelo lokugqokera lokuba i-script idinga zonke, noma yonke into iyalotholwe.
sfxgen.review.helpText: Ukusebenzisa kufaka lezi ku-audio timeline (manifest.sfx[]) njengokudadisiwe — ukusika-kwa-per-gap kulandelwa ngokuzitamazela. Izithako zethala zidlala ngokushesha; izinto "ezizotholakala" ziyizinompilo kuze kuthole ngamanye amakhasimende (Ithala → Engeza → Freesound) ngaphansi kwegama lalibonakalisiwe; render enwebi yonke okukhona kusempadisileni.
sfxgen.section.acquire: IDINGA UKUTHOLA ({count}) — hlela ibuzu, tholela emuva usuka ethalaini
sfxgen.title: KHIQIZA UHLU LWE-SFX
sfxgen.toast.applied: Uhlu lwe-SFX olusebenzeliswayo — {placed} bakahlulelwe ({reused} usuka ethalaini{acq})
shotgen.applyFootnote: Ukusebenzisa kuwubhali i-cue ngamnye enilungisiwe ye-shots[] futhi ibhali omusha character/b-roll defs. Izitshweletshwele ezisetshenziselwa kabusha zisale inazo i-cores enilungisiwe + seeds.
shotgen.emptyAllFilled: Yonke i-cue isivele inenomcimbi — akukho okungenziyo ukugcwalisa. Ekuthandeka ibhokisi ngasentla kwenziwe kabusha isikhathi sakho.
shotgen.errorGpuBusy: I-GPU ibusheleleke — ukulandeleza kukhona. Zama futhi lapho kuthulile.
shotgen.onlyMissingTooltip: Enziwe: kungiselela nje cues engenazo i-shots (okukasiwile i-cues osele usunziwe). Akungenziwa: yenziwe kabusha yonke i-cue (ifakwe ngabesifazane kuqala i-shots esikhona).
shotgen.sectionNewChars: IZIKWELANA EZINTSHA — lenziwe (uhlele i-core uma uthanda)
shotgen.title: LUNGISELELA ULUHLU LWESHOTI
sysstat.outerTooltip: i-CPU yasihositelelo · GPU · GPU RAM · isitoreji disk I/O (igunyaza ~2s)
terminal.helpMain: Isuswe. Cheka i-Connect ukuxhuma ku-<0>{session}</0> tmux session futhi ukhulume ne-Claude ngokuqonda.
terminal.title: TERMINAL
thumb.fieldsNotRecorded: — hhayi okurekhode (okuqunyulwe ngaphandle kokurekhodalwa kometadata, noma ayikho izinkambu)
thumb.promoteTip: Yenza lokhu kuguquguqua umbonakude omakhethi okwamanje
thumb.title: UMBONAKUDE WE-YOUTUBE
timeline.noVideoYet: Akukona ividiyo eyenziwe okwanje — misa umkhosi (Assembly → Run) ukuze kuningiziwe isibonelo esisixhumaniswe.
timeline.previewSubtitle: / okwenziwe — chutha umkhosi ukuze udlale — unezihlahla zomuntu nokuguquguquka kwe-audio/graphic ngemuva kokungeneza kabusha
timeline.shotMoveTip: shubela ukuze ushushuluze/uhlele kabusha — shubela posa ukuze ususe
timeline.timelineSubtitle: / dudula impahla kusuka kuposa kukhona — shubela kusambulo — shubela ikhlipu ukuze usiyalise, ikhona ukuze usilike
toast.cardTextWritten: ubhalo becardini bubhaliwe — qaphela + uhlele ngaphambi kokulandeleza
toast.compCreated: ikhadi "{composition}" lenziwe ({count} amasimu) — gcwalisa amanani, bese uLungiselela + ulandeleza
toast.emergencyStopDone: i-emergency stop kugqibile — ukulandeleza kuphathwe, umfihlelo wususuwe, i-GPU yakhululeka
toast.emergencyStopStart: i-emergency stop — iphela ukulandeleza + iyakhululeza i-GPU…
toast.gpuBusy: GPU ibusheleleke — ukulandeleza kukhona. Zama futhi lapho kuthulile.
toast.graphicImported: ikhonziswe {asset} evela ku-{slug} — yilungiselele graphics tab
toast.manifestWritten: manifest ibhaliwe — {cues} cues ({added} entsha, {reshot} yenziwe kabusha)
toast.noMastersToCache: Akukho rendered masters okucache ngalesi sikhathi
toast.seedUpdated: seed yenziwe kabusha · i-shot {key} imarkwe osindile
toast.shotApplied: uluhlu lweshoti lusetshenziswe — {appliedCues} cues, {newChars} izikwelana ezintsha, {newBroll} bhroll entsha
topbar.stopConfirm: ISITEBILE SOMPILONAPHANSI — bulala okukhanya okusebenzayo, sula i-ComfyUI queue, futhi khulule isisombululo se-GPU?
topbar.stopTitle: Isitebile sompilonaphansi: bulala okukhanya okusebenzayo, sula i-ComfyUI queue, futhi khulule isisombululo se-GPU
topbar.updateTitle: Ukubuyekezelwa kwethu {behind} lokhu okungenile okucwaningwa. Qhubeka ukuze ubuyekeze futhi ulingane.
tour.assembly.body: Ibodi yerendle. Yisa iwokeshi ephelele-ukwakhela kuze kube vidiyeyo enqenqeme, enezinzuzo zikuthi ziphendule umgaqo wokuthi zisukele. Umhlangano onzima — uyiyisiqephile kuze kube yazi konke okunye.
tour.assembly.title: Ukuhlela kabusha
tour.audio.body: Umthwali wezwi nge-cue — laya kuyona, khiqiza umugca, futhi bekelela imikhosi emidla phakathi kwamacue.
tour.audio.title: Umsebenzi wezwi
tour.docs.body: Imibalo — i-character bible, prompt docs, nokuphoqa inothi. Isikhalo, hhayi ukuedit.
tour.docs.title: Imibhalo
tour.episodePicker.body: Khetha i-episode; i-◀ ▶ arrows ithalele kuwo. Indots iwumkhakha wayo we-git-sync — okuluhlaza kuthetha woshwe, okubomvu kuthetha izinguquko zendawo.
tour.episodePicker.title: I-episode picker
tour.gitSync.body: Isingeniso kwayeni yemichazi yesichasi — isichasi, umaphu, youtube.txt — isidaka, kanti isikhusha. Ukushibha intuthu kuhlala endaweni; lokhu kumele inginqo.
tour.gitSync.title: Git sync
tour.graphics.body: Amakhalente etayithula neziphakamisi ekrwini. Khiqiza umbhalo wekhalente futhi renda izihlangu ezisungulwa esivideoni.
tour.graphics.title: Imifakelo
tour.projectMenu.body: Khiqiza noma vula amakhulosho namachanti, wena imita/exhikhitha isikhosi, nokuzilungisela — konke kuhlala lapo. Studio ingaqvuma amakhulosho amaningi njengamanje.
tour.projectMenu.title: Imenyu yekhosi
tour.ready.body: Usukulungile — qala ngokwakha ikhuluso elisha kusukela ekusindeni: vula imenyu yekhosi futhi khetha New show…. Vula kumbe ifu lethu lwamazwi nganoma isikhathi esisishwa esame menu → Tutorial. Ziyojabulela.
tour.ready.title: Kulungile ukuqala
tour.script.body: Bhala i-episode ku-Markdown, bese ucincisa Generate manifest ukuze kuqhubekele amacue okumakewe renda iphailwe.
tour.script.title: Isichasi
tour.video.body: Uhlu lwebhosi — yonke inyamazane futhi i-b-roll clip. Renda okulahlekile noma okudala; umboniso ukhombisa umphumela ngayinye.
tour.video.title: Vidiyeyo
tour.youtube.body: Qathanisa amachanti kusivumelwano se-YouTube futhi phakamisele i-video title/description metadata.
tour.youtube.title: YouTube
update.dirtyWarning: Lokhu kuhlolwa kunokudlangala okwenziwayo ekubukeni — i-update ikhubazekile ukuvimba ukusezila. Bhalisa noma kususe (noma bahlukhanya kusuka ku-terminal) okokuqala.
update.idleHint: Chisela "Khoma amahveshi" ukuze uthathe inqobo entsha.
update.phaseBuilding: Ukwakha kabusha (deps + UI)… lokhu kunganziwa ingunyana.
update.phaseRestartNeeded: Bahlukhanya ayakhe. Qala kabusha umsebenzisi ngokumunini ukuze ulayishe.
update.title: I-software update
update.updateHint: "Bahlukhanya & qala kabusha" igweba, ayakhehe i-UI, futhi iqala imisebenzi kabusha (~1 min). Ikhasi lizolayisha ngokuzijwayelekile lapho libuyekelwe.
versions.promoteTitle: Khusela le nhlayelo ukuze ibe kusetshenziswayo
video.addShotHelp: Engeza i-{kind} ukhiye kumanifohlelo. Hlukanisa usuke EUHLUKAHLWENI LOCU.
video.addShotHelpWithCue: Engeza i-{kind} ukhiye kumanifohlelo nokho ucu @{cue}. Hlukanisa usuke EUHLUKAHLWENI LOCU.
video.generateShotListTitle: Sebenzisa i-LLM endawo ukuhlongoza uhlu locu esigcini (buye imisebenzane ekwelashwa kabusha)
video.precacheTitle: Layeza yonke imisebenzane yevideo enolungile ebhawuza uphenyo lwangu-Cloudflare lwangu-instant
voicepicker.exportVoiceTitle: Download ikhlipi lesethulo lika-{name} — okwazi okusetha ezinqumeni eziningizane
voicepicker.noCharacters: Awekho abalingiswa — engeza eline, noma Generate manifest ukuze uzisuke kumakhomane.
voicepicker.omnivoiceStopped: OmniVoice imisiwe — kopha noma hlukanisa ukuhlathulelela izwi
youtube.captions.clientHelp: Okokuqala: dala i-OAuth client yohlobo "TVs and Limited Input devices" ku-Google Cloud project yakho (eyodwa enayo i-YouTube Data API enolungile), bese ipheisthi i-ID + secret yayo ngenx.
youtube.captions.noTracks: Ayikho i-subtitle tracks okusasa — qalisani lesi episode kuqala.
youtube.captions.noVideo: Ayikho i-YouTube video efanayo kule episode.
youtube.captions.quotaNote: Umhlophe ngamunye usebenzisa ~400 ye-YouTube yosuku quota (~25 uploads/day kumkhawulo wesiqalo).
youtube.captions.title: Izikhonjiso
youtube.notConfiguredBody: Wengeza API key + channel id ku-<0>~/.config/macu-studio/youtube.json</0> (noma shayela <1>YOUTUBE_API_KEY</1> / <2>YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID</2>) ukubonisa i-uploads elingcosini lapo.
filemenu.macuWebConnectHint: Ku-mayorawesome.com, vula ikhava yakho → Phatha → Xhuma i-MACU Studio → Enza i-connect token, kopyisha ithi, ubeke lapha. Lokho kuxhuma izimali zokugcina nokuthumela ngenye isinyathelo.
filemenu.macuWebConnectedHint: Ixhumeke ku-<0>{base}</0>. Ama-episodes axhaswe ayahlanganyela poqo; labo angazixhasanga ashaywa kodwa befihliwe njengoba mabhalule. Bese uphakamisele.
toast.macuWebCommitted: ithathe nkontobese ({files} amafayela) — setha izimali uthumbele
